---
title: "Introduction to Bio-ontologies"
subtitle: "OBO, RDF, RDFS, and OWL"
author: "Peter N Robinson"
institute: "Free University Berlin"
date: 2026-04-26
jupyter: python3
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: [default] 
    css: style/styles.css
    logo: images/fu_berlin_logo.png # Add your department logo
    footer: "Master Bioinformatics | Peter N Robinson"
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
    incremental: false 
    html-math-method: mathjax
    margin: 0.1
    embed-resources: true
    transition: fade
    background-transition: convex
    controls: true
---

## Course Overview

This course is held as a part of the [Master Curriculum](https://www.mi.fu-berlin.de/bioinf/stud/master/index.html) in Bioinformatics of the Free University Berlin.

## Course Overview

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="60%"}
This course is part of the [Master Curriculum](https://link-to-fu.de) in Bioinformatics.

* **Target:** Graduate Students
* **Focus:** Knowledge representation
* **University:** Free University Berlin
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
![](img/BioinfoStudiengang.png)
:::

:::

---

## Topics

The course explores the synergy between two paradigms:

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
### 🕸️ Ontologies
*Structured Knowledge*
- Formal Semantics (OWL/RDF)
- Logical Consistency
- Interoperability (OBO)
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### 🧠 LLMs
*Probabilistic Knowledge*
- Pattern Recognition
- Natural Language Interface
- Reasoning via Inference
:::

:::
